productDisplayName: Hanes Men Grey Contrast piping Lounge Pants
description: Style NoteThis Summer beat the heat and chill out with these knitted pants from hanes. The luxurious cotton fabric not only retains its shape even after repeated washes, but also offers superior comfort. And with the ComfortSoft fabric covering the elasticated waistband, be assured of a pinch-free comfortable Fit, while you can further customise the fitting with the drawstring. Wear this with sporty or casual T-shirts and revel in a comfortable lifestyle.Product DetailsFull length grey knit pants , two slant pockets at side-seam, black taping at side seam, brand badge on left side seam, elasticized waistband with drawstringMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash with like coloursLow ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
